sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἕκαστος

- Transliteration: hekastos

- Phonetic: hek'-as-tos

- Definition:

1. each, every

- Origin: as if a superlative of hekas (afar)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: As if a superlative of ἕκας hekas (afar); each or every: - any both each (one) every (man one woman) particularly.
